name: Bug report

**Describe the bug**
Clear description of what went wrong.

**To reproduce**
Steps to reproduce:
1. Go to `https://github.com/...`
2. Click on file `...`
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What should have happened.

**Screenshots**
If applicable.

**Environment**
- Chrome / Firefox version:
- GitPreview version (shown in `chrome://extensions`):
- GitHub page URL (e.g. `https://github.com/user/repo/blob/main/file.docx`):

**Console errors**
Open DevTools console (`F12` → Console tab) and paste any red errors.

**Additional context**
